creator: c0rn@o2.pl
text:
Version 0.51 was released today, patch follows...

diff -u /usr/ports/mail/libetpan/Makefile libetpan/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/mail/libetpan/Makefile   Thu Jul  5 19:33:55 2007
+++ libetpan/Makefile   Fri Aug  3 20:15:35 2007
@@ -7,8 +7,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      libetpan
-PORTVERSION=   0.49
-PORTREVISION=  2
+PORTVERSION=   0.51
 CATEGORIES=    mail
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
@@ -17,11 +16,10 @@
 COMMENT=       A mail library

 USE_ICONV=     yes
-USE_AUTOTOOLS= libtool:15 autoconf:259
-CONFIGURE_TARGET=      --build=${MACHINE_ARCH}-portbld-freebsd${OSREL}
+USE_AUTOTOOLS= libtool:15 autoconf:261
 CONFIGURE_ENV= CPPFLAGS="${CPPFLAGS}" LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes
-USE_GMAKE=     YES
+USE_GMAKE=     yes

 CPPFLAGS=      -I${LOCALBASE}/include ${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}
 LDFLAGS=       -L${LOCALBASE}/lib ${PTHREAD_LIBS}
diff -u /usr/ports/mail/libetpan/distinfo libetpan/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/mail/libetpan/distinfo   Fri Jan 12 17:43:16 2007
+++ libetpan/distinfo   Fri Aug  3 20:01:57 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (libetpan-0.49.tar.gz) = f6c973ea1aa53d947f034e093960da10
-SHA256 (libetpan-0.49.tar.gz) = 4d7257ae2cce276b2a2a66209b35ff70ff06a3ab89a2d8f2d828d7f44f78e6eb
-SIZE (libetpan-0.49.tar.gz) = 1021102
+MD5 (libetpan-0.51.tar.gz) = 6f5cd7631439637d2f34e1eb7917122d
+SHA256 (libetpan-0.51.tar.gz) = df835e22a0bc87d928b34aa889642b650f04705fbd7984c06dccddcd1aa08ac1
+SIZE (libetpan-0.51.tar.gz) = 1106628
